title: Data Analyst
summary: Data Analyst with 5 years of experience. Focused on measurable outcomes, cross-functional collaboration and reliable knowledge graph extraction signals. Core strengths include Microsoft Excel, Pandas, Microsoft Power BI, Data Modeling.

experiences.description: Delivered measurable work in data / retail using Microsoft Excel, Tableau, A/B Testing, Microsoft Power BI. Collaborated with product, engineering and operations teams to improve delivery quality.
achievements: Reduced manual effort by 18% through process and tooling improvements

Worked with cross-functional stakeholders and documented repeatable workflows
